quoteFirst: Then glancing at his two guardsmen, and finding that they were still interested in the wordy battle of the correspondents with their chief, and had seen nothing, he stooped and whispered to Gallegher: "The forms are locked at
quoteLast: . If you don't get there by that time it will be of no use, but if you're on time you'll beat the town--and the country too."
